name: HMS Armada (R 14)
events: 15 Jun 1945 She was adopted by the town of Brentwood, Essex, UK. (1)
14 Jul 1945 HrMs Van Galen (Lt.Cdr. P.A. Mulock van der Vlies Bik, RNethN) and HMS Armada (Lt.Cdr. R.A. Fell, RN) conducted torpedo firing exercises at Scapa Flow. (2)
16 Jul 1945 HrMs Van Galen (Lt.Cdr. P.A. Mulock van der Vlies Bik, RNethN) and HMS Armada (Lt.Cdr. R.A. Fell, RN) conducted exercises off Scapa Flow.
HrMs Van Galen later briefly joined the screen of several ships of the Home Fleet during an A/S exercise. (2)
